markdown:
# Tough

Your [[hit_points|Hit Point]] maximum increases by an amount equal to twice your character level when you gain this feat. Whenever you gain a character level thereafter, your [[hit_points|Hit Point]] maximum increases by an additional 2 [[hit_points]].
